descEn: Single-row adjustable blades for directional airflow. Ideal for ceiling or sidewall applications.
descZh: 单层可调叶片，实现定向送风。适用于吊顶或侧墙安装。

descEn: Front and rear adjustable blades for precise air pattern control in four directions.
descZh: 前后双层可调叶片，实现四向精确气流控制。

opt: Slot width, plenum box, end cap style
descEn: Sleek linear design for modern commercial spaces. Uniform air distribution along the entire length.
descZh: 现代商业空间的流线型设计，沿全长均匀分布气流。

descEn: Perforated faceplate for wide-angle, low-velocity air diffusion. Ideal for comfort cooling.
descZh: 多孔面板实现广角低速扩散，适用于舒适制冷。

descEn: Classic square face with multi-directional air throw. Suitable for T-bar ceiling systems.
descZh: 经典方形面板，多向送风。适用于 T 型龙骨吊顶系统。

descEn: Circular design for 360-degree air distribution. Popular in retail and hospitality.
descZh: 圆形设计实现 360 度气流分布，适用于零售和酒店空间。

descEn: Directional jet nozzle for long-throw applications such as airports and atriums.
descZh: 定向喷口，适用于机场、中庭等长距离送风场景。

descEn: Creates a swirling air pattern for rapid temperature equalization in large spaces.
descZh: 产生旋流气流，快速均衡大空间温度。

descEn: High free-area core for maximum airflow with minimal pressure drop. Ideal for return air.
descZh: 高自由面积芯体，气流阻力小，适用于回风系统。

descEn: Fixed-blade return grille with optional filter pocket for clean air return.
descZh: 固定叶片回风口，可选配过滤袋，确保回风洁净。

descEn: Recessed floor-mounted diffuser for raised-floor HVAC systems. Load-rated for foot traffic.
descZh: 架空地板系统用嵌入式地板风口，承重设计，可承受人流踩踏。

descEn: Integrated plenum box for balanced pressure distribution behind linear slots.
descZh: 集成静压箱，确保线型风口后方压力均衡分布。

descEn: Minimalist linear bar design for architectural integration. Flush or surface mount.
descZh: 极简线条设计，与建筑完美融合。可齐平或表面安装。

descEn: Curved blades for enhanced aesthetic appeal with maintained airflow performance.
descZh: 弧形叶片设计，兼顾美观与气流性能。

descEn: Diffuser with integrated volume control damper for zone-level airflow balancing.
descZh: 集成风量调节阀的风口，实现区域气流平衡。

descEn: Return grille with built-in filter pocket for improved indoor air quality.
descZh: 内置过滤袋的回风口，提升室内空气质量。

descEn: Standard rectangular duct for commercial and industrial HVAC systems. Seam-welded for durability.
descZh: 标准矩形风管，适用于商业和工业 HVAC 系统。缝焊结构，坚固耐用。

descEn: Spiral-seamed round duct for low-pressure drop and quiet airflow. Easy to transport and install.
descZh: 螺旋缝圆风管，压降低、噪音小。便于运输和安装。

descEn: Flexible duct for tight spaces and final connections. Reinforced spiral wire for shape retention.
descZh: 适用于狭小空间和末端连接的柔性风管。螺旋钢丝加固，保持形状。

descEn: Pre-insulated duct for energy efficiency and condensation prevention in climate control systems.
descZh: 预保温风管，提升能效，防止冷凝。适用于温控系统。

descEn: Corrosion-resistant duct for clean rooms, kitchens, and marine environments.
descZh: 耐腐蚀风管，适用于洁净室、厨房和海洋环境。

descEn: Pressed or segmented elbow for directional changes in ductwork. Standard 45° and 90° angles.
descZh: 冲压或分段弯头，用于风管方向改变。标准 45° 和 90° 角度。

descEn: Tee fitting for branching ductwork. Custom branch sizes and angles available.
descZh: 风管分支三通，支持定制分支尺寸和角度。

descEn: Concentric or eccentric reducer for transitioning between duct diameters.
descZh: 同心或偏心变径，用于不同管径之间的过渡。

descEn: Hand-operated damper for manual airflow adjustment in HVAC ductwork.
descZh: 手动操作的风量调节阀，用于 HVAC 管道系统的手动气流调节。

descEn: Electric actuator-driven damper for automated zone control and building management systems.
descZh: 电动执行器驱动，适用于自动化区域控制和楼宇管理系统。

descEn: Fire-rated damper with fusible link for automatic closure during fire events. Meets NFPA and EN standards.
descZh: 带易熔片的防火阀，火灾时自动关闭。符合 NFPA 和 EN 标准。

descEn: Gravity-operated damper preventing reverse airflow. Essential for exhaust and ventilation systems.
descZh: 重力驱动止回阀，防止反向气流。适用于排气和通风系统。
